title: Change Request
description: A formal change request document for significant changes that require governance review and approval.

title.description: Short title of the change request

description.description: Full description of the proposed change, including rationale and alternatives considered

requested_by.description: Person or role requesting the change

phase.description: Lifecycle phase in which this change request is raised

classification.description: Classification of the change: incremental (within scope), significant (impacts baseline), emergency (immediate action needed)

impact.description: Quantified impact assessment across key project dimensions

schedule_impact_days.description: Schedule impact in calendar days (positive = delay, negative = acceleration)

cost_impact_pct.description: Cost impact as percentage of total budget (positive = increase)

scope_description.description: Description of scope additions, removals, or modifications

risk_change.description: Description of how the risk profile changes with this request

decision.description: Governance decision on the change request

decision_authority.description: Role or body that made the decision (e.g. Steering Committee, Product Owner)

re_gate_required.description: Whether this change requires a re-gate review before implementation

conditions.description: Conditions attached to a deferred or conditional approval

implementation_date.description: Planned date for implementing the approved change (ISO 8601)
